class.name: GDKLauncher
class.brief_description: Launches supported URIs through PC GDK.
class.description: [GDKLauncher] is exposed as [code]GDK.launcher[/code]. It wraps [code]XLaunchUri[/code] for PC-supported URI launch destinations.

method.name: launch_uri
method.description: Launches an absolute URI. [param user] is optional; when provided it must be a signed-in [GDKUser].
